visa_types.name: Duration Of Stay : 60 Days
visa_types.documents_required:
- Completed Visa Application Form
- Confirmed Return/Onward Emirates ticket, highlighting the applicant's name, entry and exit from the UAE in yellow.
- A coloured recent passport-size photograph with a white background, must be front-facing and measure 2 × 2 inches, clear, sharp, with adequate brightness and contrast, without any colour filter, showing a close-up of the head and partial shoulders with the face centred and a neutral expression, fully visible from forehead to chin with eyes open, without hair or frames covering the face, against a plain white shadow-free background. Polaroid photos or those printed on ordinary printers are not accepted.
- Coloured photocopy of the main (bio) page of the Ordinary/Normal Passport (Valid for a minimum period of 6 months at the time of travel).
- Confirmed hotel voucher with confirmation number, applicant's name, check-in, check-out dates highlighted in yellow for the entire stay. ( Check- in, Check- out dates on the hotel confirmation must match the dates on flight tickets ). Note that only up to two hotel bookings are allowed for the entire stay period. For 60-day single entry visa, Hotel booking should be 31days or more.
- If visiting Family or Friends: Provide a valid tenancy contract /Ejari or title deed of the host, if the sponsor has an apartment with two or more bedrooms, UAE resident card.( Highlight the tenant's name in yellow).
visa_types.visa_fees:
[Table:  Duration Of Stay : 60 Days]

Kindly Note: The above visa is valid for a period of 58 days from the date of issue.
The mode of payment would be cash, as well as Credit Card
Selection / Determination of a visa category is on the basis of the airline ticket itinerary
Please Note: The cancellation charge per visa is 4200 DZD. Cancellation request can be raised with the application centre where you have submitted the visa application and for applications that are approved.
* Visa fee once paid is not refundable under any circumstances
visa_types.processing_time: Processing Time: 5 – 6 working days from the date of submission (except Saturday,Sunday and any Dubai Holiday)
visa_types.overview:
Overview
60 days Visit visa : The entry validity for all types of tourist visa is 58 days from the date of issue (Valid untill date mentioned on visa). After entry in Dubai stay validity of visa can be extended maximum four times, allowed for 30 days each. Extension fee is AED 850 each time.
Please contact below mentioned address before the expiry of stay validity along with original passport and extension fee once you have entered the country on same visa.

Emirates Commercial Visa Services
Dubai International Airport

Terminal 3- Arrival Area

Next to Boots Pharmacy

Timings :Monday to Friday (07:00 am to 02:30 pm) and Saturday (09:00 am to 04:00 pm)
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
60 days Visit visa : The entry validity for all types of tourist visa is 58 days from the date of issue (Valid untill date mentioned on visa). After entry in Dubai stay validity of visa can be extended maximum four times, allowed for 30 days each. Extension fee is AED 850 each time.
Please contact below mentioned address before the expiry of stay validity along with original passport and extension fee once you have entered the country on same visa.

Emirates Commercial Visa Services
Dubai International Airport

Terminal 3- Arrival Area

Next to Boots Pharmacy

Timings :Monday to Friday (07:00 am to 02:30 pm) and Saturday (09:00 am to 04:00 pm)

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Duration Of Stay : 60 Days]

Kindly Note: The above visa is valid for a period of 58 days from the date of issue.
The mode of payment would be cash, as well as Credit Card
Selection / Determination of a visa category is on the basis of the airline ticket itinerary
Please Note: The cancellation charge per visa is 4200 DZD. Cancellation request can be raised with the application centre where you have submitted the visa application and for applications that are approved.
* Visa fee once paid is not refundable under any circumstances

## Mandatory Documents

- Completed Visa Application Form
- Confirmed Return/Onward Emirates ticket, highlighting the applicant's name, entry and exit from the UAE in yellow.
- A coloured recent passport-size photograph with a white background, must be front-facing and measure 2 × 2 inches, clear, sharp, with adequate brightness and contrast, without any colour filter, showing a close-up of the head and partial shoulders with the face centred and a neutral expression, fully visible from forehead to chin with eyes open, without hair or frames covering the face, against a plain white shadow-free background. Polaroid photos or those printed on ordinary printers are not accepted.
- Coloured photocopy of the main (bio) page of the Ordinary/Normal Passport (Valid for a minimum period of 6 months at the time of travel).
- Confirmed hotel voucher with confirmation number, applicant's name, check-in, check-out dates highlighted in yellow for the entire stay. ( Check- in, Check- out dates on the hotel confirmation must match the dates on flight tickets ). Note that only up to two hotel bookings are allowed for the entire stay period. For 60-day single entry visa, Hotel booking should be 31days or more.
- If visiting Family or Friends: Provide a valid tenancy contract /Ejari or title deed of the host, if the sponsor has an apartment with two or more bedrooms, UAE resident card.( Highlight the tenant's name in yellow).

## Application Form
Click here to fill the Visa Application Form in English

Instructions:
- The form needs to be filled offline.
- You are required to fill in all the details as mentioned in the form.
- Submit it with the mandatory documents at your nearest visa application centre.

To Download a Form: 

- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer

OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

## Processing Time
Processing Time: 5 – 6 working days from the date of submission (except Saturday,Sunday and any Dubai Holiday)

## Eligibility Criteria
Note: Applicants can qualify from any one of the below criteria for UAE visa application.

## Criteria I: Travel Record
Applicants who have travelled at least once in the last 5 years to or has a valid visa for countries like USA, UK, Schengen countries, European Union, Australia, New Zealand, Russia, Canada, Switzerland and Japan or have evidence of travel records in the last five (5) years to the UAE.

Supporting documents required
- Pages exhibiting the evidence of the travel and Visa in current or previous Passport.

## Criteria II: Financial Records

Applicants not qualifying as per Criteria I (Travel Record), is required to submit bank statement for past six months which proves they have sufficient funds for their stay in UAE
or
A Security Deposit of 120000 DZD, which will be returned back to the Applicants upon their return to Algeria, once they show the entry and exit stamp of Dubai.

Supporting documents required
- Original Bank Statement.

## Criteria III: Invitation from immediate family member residing in UAE on family status

Supporting documents required
- Valid tenancy contract /Ejari or title deed of the Host. ** Host should have an apartment with two or more bedrooms.
- Relationship with the Host
- UAE resident card of the Host

Newly Married Couple:
In case of the spouse’s name not endorsed on the passport:

Supporting documents required
- Marriage Certificate / Notarised Affidavit.
- Newly married couples traveling immediately after marriage are required to submit NOC from parents with photo id proof, Wedding card and Marriage photograph of the couple

Important Information:
- Selection / determination of a visa category are on the basis of airline ticket itinerary
- Emirates regret its inability to sponsor unaccompanied minors and students. Dubai immigration will consider applications from minors and students only if they are travelling with parents.

visa_types.name: Duration Of Stay : 96 Hours
visa_types.documents_required:
- Visa application form duly filled**
- Confirmed onward or return ticket copy of Emirates Airline **
- A coloured recent passport-size photograph with a white background, must be front-facing and measure 2 × 2 inches, clear, sharp, with adequate brightness and contrast, without any colour filter, showing a close-up of the head and partial shoulders with the face centred and a neutral expression, fully visible from forehead to chin with eyes open, without hair or frames covering the face, against a plain white shadow-free background. Polaroid photos or those printed on ordinary printers are not accepted.
- Photocopies of the first four pages of the Passport ** (valid for six months from the date of application). Passports containing special characters such as brackets in the name will not be accepted and must be amended prior to visa submission.
- A valid visa for the destination country travelling to and arriving from UAE.
- A valid confirmed Hotel booking or Proof of residence for your entire stay in UAE. Applicant’s name and check-in/out dates highlighted in yellow ( Check- in, Check- out dates on the hotel confirmation must match the dates on flight tickets )
- An Original Bank Statement for past six months which proves they have sufficient funds for their stay in UAE.**
- Note: At the time of entry, the passenger must prove that they have enough financial resources to cover their expenses during the trip and a confirmed hotel booking**
- For other supporting documents please go to Eligibility Criteria.

Kindly Note: The above visa is valid for a period of 30 days from the date of issue.
The mode of payment would be cash, as well as Credit Card
Selection / Determination of a visa category is on the basis of the airline ticket itinerary

* Visa fee once paid is not refundable under any circumstances

visa_types.overview:
Overview
96 Hours  Visa: This Visa is valid only for 96 hours and is ideal for travellers to the UAE who plan to stay for a period of less than 4 days. This type of Visa is preferred
                                                                    by travellers having business meetings, point to point travel or taking stopovers en route to their onward journey. Visa is valid for 30 days from the date of issue.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
96 Hours  Visa: This Visa is valid only for 96 hours and is ideal for travellers to the UAE who plan to stay for a period of less than 4 days. This type of Visa is preferred
                                                                    by travellers having business meetings, point to point travel or taking stopovers en route to their onward journey. Visa is valid for 30 days from the date of issue.

- A coloured recent passport-size photograph with a white background, must be front-facing and measure 2 × 2 inches, clear, sharp, with adequate brightness and contrast, without any colour filter, showing a close-up of the head and partial shoulders with the face centred and a neutral expression, fully visible from forehead to chin with eyes open, without hair or frames covering the face, against a plain white shadow-free background. visa_types.processing_time: Processing Time: 5 – 6 working days from the date of submission (except Saturday,Sunday and any UAE Holiday)
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Multi Entry Long Term Visa : Traveller must make his first entry in UAE within validity period of 58 days (valid until date mentioned on visa). With effect from the date of FIRST entry visa is valid for 60 days. Within the period of these 60 days traveller can make multiple entries / exits to / from UAE. However make sure that his/her last exit from UAE should be on or before 60th day.
After entry in Dubai stay validity of visa can be extended maximum four times, allowed for 30 days each. Extension fee is AED 850 each time.
Please contact below mentioned address before expiry of stay validity along with original passport and extension fee once you have entered the country on same visa.

Emirates Commercial Visa Services

Dubai International Airport

Terminal 3- Arrival Area

Next to Boots Pharmacy

Timings : Monday to Friday (07:00 am to 02:30 pm) and Saturday (09:00 am to 04:00 pm)
Multiple entry visa once utilized cannot be cancelled. The applicant would have to await expiry of the visa validity. The validity of the visa is 58 days from the date of issue and the client can enter UAE multiple times and stay there for 60 Days from the first entry in UAE.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Multi Entry Long Term Visa : Traveller must make his first entry in UAE within validity period of 58 days (valid until date mentioned on visa). With effect from the date of FIRST entry visa is valid for 60 days. Within the period of these 60 days traveller can make multiple entries / exits to / from UAE. However make sure that his/her last exit from UAE should be on or before 60th day.
After entry in Dubai stay validity of visa can be extended maximum four times, allowed for 30 days each. Extension fee is AED 850 each time.
Please contact below mentioned address before expiry of stay validity along with original passport and extension fee once you have entered the country on same visa.

Emirates Commercial Visa Services

Dubai International Airport

Terminal 3- Arrival Area

Next to Boots Pharmacy

Timings : Monday to Friday (07:00 am to 02:30 pm) and Saturday (09:00 am to 04:00 pm)
Multiple entry visa once utilized cannot be cancelled. The applicant would have to await expiry of the visa validity. The validity of the visa is 58 days from the date of issue and the client can enter UAE multiple times and stay there for 60 Days from the first entry in UAE.

Polaroid photos or those printed on ordinary printers are not accepted.

( Check- in, Check- out dates on the hotel confirmation must match the dates on flight tickets ). Note that only up to two hotel bookings are allowed for the entire stay period. For 60-day single entry visa, Hotel booking should be 31days or more.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Short Term Visit Single Entry – Tourist : The entry validity for all types of tourist visa is 58 days from the date of issue (Valid untill date mentioned on visa). After entry in Dubai stay validity of visa can be extended twice with first extension allowed for 30 days and second extension for 20 days. Extension fee is AED 850 each time.
Please contact below mentioned address before the expiry of stay validity along with original passport and extension fee once you have entered the country on same visa.
Emirates Commercial Visa Services
Dubai International Airport
Terminal 3- Arrival Area
Next to Boots Pharmacy

Timings :Monday to Friday (07:00 am to 02:30 pm) and Saturday (09:00 am to 04:00 pm)
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Short Term Visit Single Entry – Tourist : The entry validity for all types of tourist visa is 58 days from the date of issue (Valid untill date mentioned on visa). After entry in Dubai stay validity of visa can be extended twice with first extension allowed for 30 days and second extension for 20 days. Extension fee is AED 850 each time.
Please contact below mentioned address before the expiry of stay validity along with original passport and extension fee once you have entered the country on same visa.
Emirates Commercial Visa Services
Dubai International Airport
Terminal 3- Arrival Area
Next to Boots Pharmacy

Timings :Monday to Friday (07:00 am to 02:30 pm) and Saturday (09:00 am to 04:00 pm)

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Duration Of Stay : 30 Days]

Kindly Note: The above visa is valid for a period of 58 days from the date of issue.
The mode of payment would be cash, as well as Credit Card
Selection / Determination of a visa category is on the basis of the airline ticket itinerary
Please Note: The cancellation charge per visa is 4200 DZD. Cancellation request can be raised with the application centre where you have submitted the visa application and for applications that are approved.
* Visa fee once paid is not refundable under any circumstances

## Mandatory Documents

- Completed Visa Application Form
- Confirmed Return/Onward Emirates ticket, highlighting the applicant's name, entry and exit from the UAE in yellow.
- A coloured recent passport-size photograph with a white background, must be front-facing and measure 2 × 2 inches, clear, sharp, with adequate brightness and contrast, without any colour filter, showing a close-up of the head and partial shoulders with the face centred and a neutral expression, fully visible from forehead to chin with eyes open, without hair or frames covering the face, against a plain white shadow-free background. Polaroid photos or those printed on ordinary printers are not accepted.
- Coloured photocopy of the main (bio) page of the Ordinary/Normal Passport (Valid for a minimum period of 6 months at the time of travel).
- Confirmed hotel voucher with confirmation number, applicant's name, check-in, check-out dates highlighted in yellow for the entire stay. ( Check- in, Check- out dates on the hotel confirmation must match the dates on flight tickets ). Note that only up to two hotel bookings are allowed for the entire stay period. For 60-day single entry visa, Hotel booking should be 31days or more.
- If visiting Family or Friends: Provide a valid tenancy contract /Ejari or title deed of the host, if the sponsor has an apartment with two or more bedrooms, UAE resident card.( Highlight the tenant's name in yellow).

## Application Form
Click here to fill the Visa Application Form in English
Instructions:
- The form needs to be filled offline.
- You are required to fill in all the details as mentioned in the form.
- Submit it with the mandatory documents at your nearest visa application centre.
To Download a Form: 

- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.

OR

- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

## Processing Time
Processing Time: 5 – 6 working days from the date of submission (except Saturday,Sunday and any Dubai Holiday)

## Eligibility Criteria
Note: Applicants can qualify from any one of the below criteria for UAE visa application.

## Criteria I: Travel Record
Applicants who have travelled at least once in the last 5 years to or has a valid visa for countries like USA, UK, Schengen countries, European Union, Australia, New Zealand, Russia, Canada, Switzerland and Japan or have evidence of travel records in the last five (5) years to the UAE.

Supporting documents required
- Pages exhibiting the evidence of the travel and Visa in current or previous Passport.

## Criteria II: Financial Records

Applicants not qualifying as per Criteria I (Travel Record), is required to submit bank statement for past six months which proves they have sufficient funds for their stay in UAE
or
A Security Deposit of 120000 DZD, which will be returned back to the Applicants upon their return to Algeria, once they show the entry and exit stamp of Dubai.

Supporting documents required

- Original Bank Statement.

## Criteria III: Invitation from immediate family member residing in UAE on family status

Supporting documents required
- Valid tenancy contract /Ejari or title deed of the Host. ** Host should have an apartment with two or more bedrooms.
- Relationship with the Host
- UAE resident card of the Host

Newly Married Couple:
In case of the spouse’s name not endorsed on the passport:

Supporting documents required

- Marriage Certificate / Notarised Affidavit.
- Newly married couples traveling immediately after marriage are required to submit NOC from parents with photo id proof, Wedding card and Marriage photograph of the couple

Important Information:
- Selection / determination of a visa category are on the basis of airline ticket itinerary
- Emirates regret its inability to sponsor unaccompanied minors and students. Dubai immigration will consider applications from minors and students only if they are travelling with parents.

(Duration of stay: 30 days, Visa fees inclusive of service charge and tax)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Multi Entry Short Term Visa : Traveller must make his first entry in UAE within validity period of 58 days (valid until date mentioned on visa). With effect from the date of FIRST entry visa is valid for 30 days. Within the period of these 30 days traveller can make multiple entries / exits to / from UAE. However make sure that his/her last exit from UAE should be on or before 30th day.
After entry in Dubai stay validity of visa can be extended twice with first extension allowed for 30 days and second extension for 20 days. Extension fee is AED 850 each time.
Please contact below mentioned address before expiry of stay validity along with original passport and extension fee once you have entered the country on same visa.

Emirates Commercial Visa Services

Dubai International Airport

Terminal 3- Arrival Area

Next to Boots Pharmacy

Timings : Monday to Friday (07:00 am to 02:30 pm) and Saturday (09:00 am to 04:00 pm)
Multiple entry visa once utilized cannot be cancelled. The applicant would have to await expiry of the visa validity. The validity of the visa is 58 days from the date of issue and the client can enter UAE multiple times and stay there for 30 Days from the first entry in UAE.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Multi Entry Short Term Visa : Traveller must make his first entry in UAE within validity period of 58 days (valid until date mentioned on visa). With effect from the date of FIRST entry visa is valid for 30 days. Within the period of these 30 days traveller can make multiple entries / exits to / from UAE. However make sure that his/her last exit from UAE should be on or before 30th day.
After entry in Dubai stay validity of visa can be extended twice with first extension allowed for 30 days and second extension for 20 days. Extension fee is AED 850 each time.
Please contact below mentioned address before expiry of stay validity along with original passport and extension fee once you have entered the country on same visa.

Emirates Commercial Visa Services

Dubai International Airport

Terminal 3- Arrival Area

Next to Boots Pharmacy

Timings : Monday to Friday (07:00 am to 02:30 pm) and Saturday (09:00 am to 04:00 pm)
Multiple entry visa once utilized cannot be cancelled. The applicant would have to await expiry of the visa validity. The validity of the visa is 58 days from the date of issue and the client can enter UAE multiple times and stay there for 30 Days from the first entry in UAE.

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Multi Entry Short Term Visa : 30 Days]
(Duration of stay: 30 days, Visa fees inclusive of service charge and tax)
The mode of payment would be cash, as well as Credit Card
Selection / Determination of a visa category is on the basis of the airline ticket itinerary
Please Note: The cancellation charge per visa is 4200 DZD. Cancellation request can be raised with the application centre where you have submitted the visa application and for applications that are approved.
Visa fee once paid is not refundable under any circumstances

## Mandatory Documents
- Completed Visa Application Form
- Confirmed Return/Onward Emirates ticket, highlighting the applicant's name, entry and exit from the UAE in yellow.
- A coloured recent passport-size photograph with a white background, must be front-facing and measure 2 × 2 inches, clear, sharp, with adequate brightness and contrast, without any colour filter, showing a close-up of the head and partial shoulders with the face centred and a neutral expression, fully visible from forehead to chin with eyes open, without hair or frames covering the face, against a plain white shadow-free background. Polaroid photos or those printed on ordinary printers are not accepted.
- Coloured photocopy of the main (bio) page of the Ordinary/Normal Passport (Valid for a minimum period of 6 months at the time of travel).
- Confirmed hotel voucher with confirmation number, applicant's name, check-in, check-out dates highlighted in yellow for the entire stay. ( Check- in, Check- out dates on the hotel confirmation must match the dates on flight tickets ). Note that only up to two hotel bookings are allowed for the entire stay period. For 60-day single entry visa, Hotel booking should be 31days or more.
- If visiting Family or Friends: Provide a valid tenancy contract /Ejari or title deed of the host, if the sponsor has an apartment with two or more bedrooms, UAE resident card.( Highlight the tenant's name in yellow).

## Application Form
Click here to fill the Visa Application Form in English (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/7BebMAlXUgWxb2lHkmKkzw/cf712ae08ee2c4bef9cf4fff823eca13/visa-application-form-dvpc_algeria.pdf)
Instructions:
- The form needs to be filled offline.
- You are required to fill in all the details as mentioned in the form.
- Submit it with the mandatory documents at your nearest visa application centre.
To Download a Form: 

- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer

OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

## Processing Time
Processing Time: 5 – 6 working days from the date of submission (except Saturday,Sunday and any UAE Holiday)

## Eligibility Criteria

Note: Applicants can qualify from any one of the below criteria for UAE visa application.

## Criteria I: Travel Record
Applicants who have travelled at least once in the last 5 years to or has a valid visa for countries like USA, UK, Schengen countries, European Union, Australia, New Zealand, Russia, Canada, Switzerland and Japan or have evidence of travel records in the last five (5) years to the UAE.

Supporting documents required
- Pages exhibiting the evidence of the travel and Visa in current or previous Passport.

## Criteria II: Financial Records

Applicants not qualifying as per Criteria I (Travel Record), is required to submit bank statement for past six months which proves they have sufficient funds for their stay in UAE
or
A Security Deposit of 120000 DZD, which will be returned back to the Applicants upon their return to Algeria, once they show the entry and exit stamp of Dubai.

Supporting documents required
- Original Bank Statement.

## Criteria III: Invitation from immediate family member residing in UAE on family status

Supporting documents required

- Valid tenancy contract /Ejari or title deed of the Host. ** Host should have an apartment with two or more bedrooms.
- Relationship with the Host
- UAE resident card of the Host

Newly Married Couple:
In case of the spouse’s name not endorsed on the passport:

Supporting documents required

- Marriage Certificate / Notarised Affidavit.
- Newly married couples traveling immediately after marriage are required to submit NOC from parents with photo id proof, Wedding card and Marriage photograph of the couple

Important Information:
- Selection / determination of a visa category are on the basis of airline ticket itinerary
- Emirates regret its inability to sponsor unaccompanied minors and students. Dubai immigration will consider applications from minors and students only if they are travelling with parents.
